trivia_bullets.text: Tusked Colossodon is a Temur Frontier common, a 6/5 Beast for {4}{G}{G}. The Temur are the green-blue-red clan of Tarkir's mountainous wilderness, defined by ferocity and the philosophy that raw power determines survival. [Scryfall], [Wizards: Planeswalker's Guide to Khans of Tarkir, Part 1]

"A band of Temur hunters, fleeing the Mardu, dug a hideout beneath such a creature as it slept. The horde found them and attacked. For three days the Temur held them at bay, and all the while the great beast slumbered." [Scryfall] — Illustrates Temur guerrilla survival using the Colossodon's indifferent bulk as cover to outlast a Mardu raid. The Mardu are the red-white-black raiding clan, the Temur's primary rival.

As a vanilla 6/5 common, Tusked Colossodon served a specific Limited purpose: providing a reliable Ferocious-activating body in the Temur curve. A 6/5 is large enough to survive most combat encounters in Limited and its power of 6 easily meets the Ferocious threshold (power 4+). [Wizards: Mechanics of Khans of Tarkir], [Scryfall]
Tusked Colossodon has never been reprinted. EDHREC rank is 25,184 — well outside regular Commander play. Illustrated by Yeong-Hao Han. [Scryfall], [EDHREC: Tusked Colossodon]
